title: Holy Cross College Admission Preparation
body:
কলেজ এডমিশন প্রস্তুতির সবকিছুর জন্য ক্লিক করো এই লিংকেঃ https://edgecoursebd.com/courses/college-admission-course-ssc23-batch/

HSC 25 বা যারা মাত্র SSC শেষ করলা তোমরা HSC'র পড়াশুনা শুরু করে দিতে পারো এখান থেকেঃ https://edgecoursebd.com/courses/hsc-25-academic-to-admission-course/

৩০% ডিসকাউন্ট পেতে কোপন কোডঃ EIDULAZHA100

HSC ও ভার্সিটি এডমিশনে ভালো করতে চাইলেঃ https://www.youtube.com/@HulkenSteinHSC

✅ ওয়েবসাইট থেকে যেভাবে কোর্সে রেজিস্ট্রেশন করবেন: https://youtu.be/GAXPkJgq_JA

✅ আপনার রেজিস্ট্রেশনকৃত কোর্সগুলো আমাদের ওয়েবসাইট এর মাধ্যেমে এক্সেস করার নিয়ম: https://youtu.be/NE7uY05mqhE

যেকোনো জিজ্ঞাসায় মেসেজ করো Edge Course এর ফেসবুক পেজে https://m.me/edgecourse

title: I left Holy Cross College!! MY entire HSC life storyline 🌻| Suravi's Diaries
body: I don't know how long you stayed in Holy Cross. But I can fully affirm, even though you left, you bear in you the spirit of unbreakable determination, a quality native to all crossians. I also don't know if I should say these terms as I don't believe in them. But I do believe in spirit, spirit of a place or institution. At Holy Cross, I also had the hardest time of my life. But I think it shaped me in ways I otherwise could not become. This shift was really necessary in your life, dear. Sometimes we fall to soar higher. My bestest wishes for you and your future.
author: @Onlyexperts0

title: I left Holy Cross College!! MY entire HSC life storyline 🌻| Suravi's Diaries
body:
To juniors from an alumni of HCC,
My college life was really depressive and overwhelming, especially as I came from outside of Dhaka and struggled to adapt as an introvert. Adjusting to a new environment and diverse people was not easy. While some classmates seemed to excel effortlessly, many of us were quietly struggling. Despite the pressure, I kept trying and did not give up, and today I am studying at my dream university also I miss my college very much. My experience taught me that setbacks do not define us, everyone faces unseen struggles. The pressure of college broke me at times, but it also made me stronger and more resilient and disciplined. Every college has its own challenges and charm, so it should not be viewed negatively. Not everyone can handle pressure in the same way, and there is no point in placing blame. I wish all my juniors the very best and hope you grow, learn, and reach your full potential through your time at our college. ❤
author: @itsmeeee404

title: I left Holy Cross College!! MY entire HSC life storyline 🌻| Suravi's Diaries
body: Missionary colleges are not for everyone. And not all missionary colleges are the same in terms of quality. But tbh, I think these colleges are overhyped. They tell us that they ensure an environment for quality education, but ir, they just push quiz exams so that students study. Their club activities are okay but not up to the mark. I don't want to mention the name exactly. Currently, I'm studying in a missionary clg located in Puran Dhaka, and I will say that it was one of the biggest mistakes of my life. Their pressure is affecting my studies. Their syllabus is also weird and strange. I can't express how stressed I am rn. I can't even write what I'm wanting to tell cz many things are on my head. In conclusion, I just wanna say… if you can take immense pressure and are capable of managing their quiz study and HSC prep in parallel, then you may go. But if you can't, plz don't waste your life's important years. You'll regret later.
author: @rfzzz2300

title: I left Holy Cross College!! MY entire HSC life storyline 🌻| Suravi's Diaries
body:
Thank you soo much apu❤
I’m an SSC candidate of 2027. I know I’m really young rn. but since the beginning of my high school journey, my dream college has been Holy Cross. Even till now, I always tell everyone that it is either Holy Cross or nothing. But this video has changed my perspective! I myself am really strong. The amount of pressure I take in this age is beyond other’s capacity of my age. But I’m really perseverant. Once I’ve decided to achieve something,I’ll do EVERYTHING to achieve it. I’ve scored top in my district soo many times. my next goal is to achieve a great position in SSC. I hope I will be able to bear the academic pressure. But I’m really immatured in other sides. I can’t imagine staying at a completely different environment and specifically without my friends and family. But I hope whatever Allah has written in my taqdeer, will be the best for me. But for now,I’ll try my best to get a chance into that college. I wanna make my mother proud.❤
author: @0TeddyBear0
